    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    CollectionCenter
    Represents a medical collection center where organs are prepared.
    DelaunayTriangulation
    Represents a simplified Delaunay triangulation.
    DeliveryRequest
    Represents a medical request for organ delivery.
    Drone
    Represents a drone
    DroneBase
    Represents a drone base that contains drones
    DroneStatus
     
    Hospital
    Represents a hospital receiving an organ delivery.
    ImportExportService
    Service used to import and export a complete map in binary format.
    ImportExportService
    Service used to import and export a complete map in binary format, and to import medical sites in bulk from a CSV file.
    Main
    Complete command line version.
    MainApp
    JavaFX entry point — MEDADRONE Organ Delivery System.
    MainWindow
    Main JavaFX window — MEDADRONE Organ Delivery System.
    MapCanvas
    Map canvas for the MEDADRONE application.
    MapModel
    Central model of the application map.
    MedicalSite
    Abstract parent class for medical sites displayed on the map.
    MedicalStaff
    Represents a doctor or medical staff member using the platform.
    Mission
    Represents an actual drone delivery mission.
    MissionStatus
    Represents the status of a delivery mission.
    OptimizationService
    Service responsible for drone selection, route computation and mission creation. ── Algorithmic logic ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 1.
    OrganType
    Represents an organ type
    Position
    Represents a two-dimensional position on the map.
    PriorityLevel
    Represents the medical priority level of a delivery request.
    PriorityLevel
    Represents the medical priority level of a delivery request.
    RequestStatus
    Represents the status of a delivery request.
    Route
    Represents the route followed by a drone.
    Triangle
    Represents a triangle between three medical sites.
    UserPoint
    Represents a user point on the map.
    VoronoiCell
    Represents one simplified Voronoi cell.
    VoronoiDiagram
    Represents a simplified Voronoi diagram.
